signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trump's indefinite extension of the Iran ceasefire, announced April 22, 2026, has removed the Hormuz geopolitical risk premium, driving a broad crypto rally with Bitcoin up 2.2% to $77,541, Ethereum up 0.7% to $2,390, and XRP up 1.5% to $1.45.[1]
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?

signals.headline: Strategy Discloses $2
signals.raw:
Strategy Discloses $2.54 Billion Bitcoin Purchase | YES | HIGH confidence**  
MicroStrategy revealed a $2.54 billion BTC buy on April 22, 2026, lifting holdings past 815,000 coins and absorbing three times April's global miner supply, forcing shorts to unwind above $76,000 and boosting Ethereum and XRP alongside BTC.[1]
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit $65
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit $65.89 Million in April | YES | MED confidence**  
XRP investment products recorded $65.89 million in inflows by mid-April 2026, with a six-day streak averaging double-digit millions daily, signaling institutional rotation past Bitcoin and Ethereum amid DeFi expansions.[3]
